title: limniris clarkei
intro: Limniris clarkei, also known as Himalayan blue poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Limniris clarkei include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, making it a popular treatment for conditions such as arthritis. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or cream.
